prompt_raw: Demo hero image: a tiny terminal pastebin application called nightjar shown as a dark CRT terminal window on a near-black background. A list of paste rows rendered in monospace, flat surfaces with hairline borders, quiet and terse. A single yellow accent on the wordmark 'nightjar' at the top; everything else dark and dim. A 3:2 landscape. No characters, no scenes, flat color only, no glow.
prompt_final:
Dark CRT terminal aesthetic on near-black `#0a0a0a`. Flat color only: surfaces
`#161616`, hairline strokes `#2a2a2a`, text `#e8e8e8`, single yellow accent
`#FFCC00` used sparingly. Monospace labels, terse. Diagrams and technical
compositions only — no characters, scenes, or illustrations. No gradients, no
shadows, no glow, no rounded corners, no neon or synthwave. Quiet terminal
aesthetic.

Demo hero image: a tiny terminal pastebin application called nightjar shown as a dark CRT terminal window on a near-black background. A list of paste rows rendered in monospace, flat surfaces with hairline borders, quiet and terse. A single yellow accent on the wordmark 'nightjar' at the top; everything else dark and dim. A 3:2 landscape. No characters, no scenes, flat color only, no glow.
